description: Rejected concept patterns log. Each entry is a concept/combination that either failed critic scoring OR produced visual problems in iteration. The design-creator reads this to avoid repeating known-bad combinations.

rejections.brief: Poster for fictional Blue Note Records jazz quartet album BLUE NOTHING
rejections.what_was_tried: Giant 'BLUE' cropped off left edge + outline 'NOTHING' letters with paper showing through + musical quarter-rest inside the O
rejections.why_rejected: User preferred v2 (image-dominant with vinyl record) over v1 (type-dominant). V1 was conceptually strong but read as 'experimental editorial' rather than 'Blue Note label'. The vinyl variant landed the heritage reference more cleanly.
rejections.lesson: For heritage-label music posters, image-forward (artifact) often beats type-forward (conceptual). Save type-dominant for contemporary / conceptual releases where heritage isn't the anchor.

rejections.what_was_tried: Footer micro-credits at font-size=7 letter-spacing=2 with 115 characters '/ORIGINAL SCORE JONAS HILLBORG · CINEMATOGRAPHY SHIMA ARAKAWA · EDITED BY CLEMENT DUFOUR · PRODUCED BY AREL NYX/'
rejections.why_rejected: Text width at those settings computed to 1026px. Safe zone is 500px. ~526px overflow. User caught it visibly.
rejections.lesson: At font-size=7, max line width is ~70 chars at tracking=1. For 80+ chars, split across 2 lines OR reduce tracking OR shorten text. The layout-verifier now catches this automatically.

rejections.what_was_tried: Studio edition marks at y=883 outside the outer frame which ended at y=860
rejections.why_rejected: Marks rendered BELOW the decorative frame, breaking the composed container. User caught visibly.
rejections.lesson: When extending content below a frame, EXTEND the frame too (adjust outer rect height). Never let content float below its container. Layout-verifier now catches frame-exit.

rejections.what_was_tried: 'A CONTEMPLATIVE SOULSLIKE · SINGLE PLAYER · FIRST AND THIRD PERSON' at font=9 tracking=4 centered at x=306
rejections.why_rejected: 63 chars × 8.95 width-per-char = 564px. Safe zone 500px. 64px overflow split both sides.
rejections.lesson: Tracking=4 is aggressive. At that tracking, keep strings under 55 chars. Or drop tracking to 2-3 for longer strings. Fixed by shortening to '1ST / 3RD PERSON' + reducing tracking to 2.5.

rejections.what_was_tried: Footer copy 'compose2026.dev · registration opens 01 MAR 2026 · early bird $890' on left anchor + '© MMXXVI COMPOSE FOUNDATION' on right anchor
rejections.why_rejected: Left line ended at x=448. Right line started at x=398. 50px horizontal overlap.
rejections.lesson: When two text blocks flank the same line (left-anchor + right-anchor), sum their widths + 30px minimum gap. If sum > 470px, split onto two lines instead.

rejections.brief: Blue Note label arc text on vinyl
rejections.what_was_tried: textPath with arc defined as 'M 300,460 A 100,100 0 0 1 540,460' but the label center is at (420, 360)
rejections.why_rejected: Arc path was 100px BELOW the label center. Arc text rendered at completely wrong vertical position, crossed through central title text.
rejections.lesson: For textPath arcs around a label, compute path coordinates based on (label_cx, label_cy) not arbitrary numbers. radius should be slightly inside label boundary. Verify arc endpoints match circle geometry.

rejections.what_was_tried: 'A FILM BY LIN KERR' at y=96 (baseline) + ARRAKIS at y=140 (baseline, font-size 60)
rejections.why_rejected: ARRAKIS cap-top at y=98 (140 - 60*0.72 = 98). Over-title baseline y=96, descenders reach y=99. Vertical gap was literally 0-1px. User caught 'merges together'.
rejections.lesson: For large titles, always calculate cap-top AND over-title descender-bottom. Minimum 10-15px gap between them. Rule of thumb: space between title and over-title ≥ over-title font-size. Fixed by moving over-title to y=86 (10px lift).

rejections.what_was_tried: 'Blue' at x=56 font=42 letter-spacing=-1 (width ~78px, ends ~x=134) + 'Nothing' at x=140
rejections.why_rejected: Only 6px gap between 'Blue' end and 'Nothing' start. Italic 'N' of Nothing overlapped with 'e' of Blue.
rejections.lesson: Between two words styled differently (weight or italic), gap should be at least one character width (~20-30px for 42pt type). Fixed by moving Nothing to x=168 (34px gap).

anti-pattern_register_by_style.kenya-hara: neon, gradients, maximalism, drop-shadows, 3+ accent colors
anti-pattern_register_by_style.paula-scher: centered symmetric, uniform type size, quiet restraint
anti-pattern_register_by_style.refik-anadol: warm paper, classical serif, recognizable figures
anti-pattern_register_by_style.massimo-vignelli: more than 6 typefaces, gradients, illustration flourishes

structural_monotony_crutches.observed: After 3 consecutive posters (Digital Loneliness / Burn the Night / LAST SIGNAL v1) user flagged them as structurally identical despite palette/subject variation. Root cause: Claude defaults to Archetype 1 (Classical Centered Hero) with fixed sub-elements regardless of brief.

forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.flag_if_present: Is this a formal/institutional poster brief? If not, drop it.
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.alternatives: full-bleed (no frame), thick brutal frame (stroke 2-3px), asymmetric frame breaking one edge, no frame but inset content with margin-as-frame

forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.pattern: Top meta line split L/R (studio + catalog number)
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.flag_if_present: Is brief cinema/museum/label identity? If not, drop it.
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.alternatives: no top meta at all, single centered wordmark, vertical wordmark along one edge, type-as-image starts at top

forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.pattern: Hero zone above → divider rule → typography block → footer split below
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.flag_if_present: This is the most-defaulted sequence. Break it.
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.alternatives: type above with image below, image bleeding around type, type wrapping image shape, single-element composition with no zones, full-bleed atmospheric with type as overlay, diagonal layout axis, vertical stacked type along edge

forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.pattern: Brutalist research annotations (SUBJECT/01, SPEED 247, SIGNAL 4%, O₂ 11:34, D/EARTH 14.2 AU, FIG. I)
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.flag_if_present: Did brief mention 'research poster' / 'technical manual' / 'data-dense' / 'specification'? If not, these are Claude's crutch — remove.
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.alternatives: silence — just the primary composition. Or use real narrative elements that belong to the subject, not simulated research.

forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.flag_if_present: Is this a mission briefing or cartography subject? If not, drop.
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.alternatives: no annotation at all, or annotation that belongs to the actual subject matter

forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.pattern: Footer catalog split: 'CAT · XXX-001 / DATE' left + 'STUDIO' right at font-size 6.5
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.flag_if_present: This is the most tiring repeated signature.
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.alternatives: single centered credit, no footer at all, credit as part of title block, credit hidden in margin

forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.pattern: Stacked italic elements: over-title italic + subtitle italic + tagline italic + credit italic
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.flag_if_present: More than 2 italic elements in same poster = italic fatigue.
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.alternatives: pick ONE italic — usually subtitle. Title and credits stay roman.

forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.pattern: Letter-spacing > 8 on anything other than small-caps labels
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.flag_if_present: Bringhurst: caps track 5-12%, lower-case body 0 to -2%. Nothing else needs 8+px tracking.
forbidden_unless_brief_explicitly_demand.alternatives: match Bringhurst conventions: caps +5-12%, lowercase ≈0, display tight or negative.

structural_monotony_crutches.enforcement: concept-explorer.md Step 8 now reads structural-variance.md and forbids Archetype 1 when last 3 winning concepts used it. design-creator SKILL.md must verify output does not contain forbidden-signature patterns above.

overflow_prevention_rules: For text-anchor=middle: calculate total width with current font + letter-spacing BEFORE placing. If > 500px, reduce one variable.
For text-anchor=start+end on same line: sum widths + 30px minimum gap. Total ≤ 470px or split lines.
For large display type: calculate cap-top = y - font_size*0.72 AND descender = y + font_size*0.22. Compare against neighboring elements.
For word pairs with different styling: gap ≥ one char width of the larger font.
For multi-line tagline blocks: line-height should be font_size * 1.3 (Bringhurst). If font=14, leading=18.
For footer stacks: start from frame bottom - 16px margin and work upward.
